title: The Slip Master's Structural Warning
description: Riker shows you a joint bolt on the slip's main loading platform that has worked loose under the continuous weight of infantry loading. He has been kicking it back with his boot every quarter hour. If the artillery limbers—each weighing over eight hundred pounds—are driven onto this structure, the joint will likely fail, dropping the forward platform into the river and blocking the slip entirely for at least an hour while repairs are improvised.
